serverInfo.name: milkyway-center-v131
serverInfo.title: Milkyway Center — V131 Silicon Photonic Chip & Photonic Cipher
serverInfo.description: V131 silicon photonic chip: topological manifold processor on SOI with 2^363 crystal manifold, 80ch DWDM, ~120 PFLOPS projected. Hardware-validated 1.4ns photonic cipher with 0/40 anti-spoofing on real 30m fiber. 3/3 tapeout PASS, 9/9 cipher tests PASS.

resources.name: V131 Silicon Photonic Chip — Full Report
resources.description: Complete report: silicon photonic chip tapeout (topological manifold processor, DWDM, specs, NVIDIA B200 comparison) and hardware validation (9/9 tests, cipher architecture, anti-spoofing, HFT relevance).

resources.name: V131 Full Report (Markdown)
resources.description: Machine-readable markdown version of the full V131 silicon photonic chip and cipher report.

resources.name: V131 LLM Summary
resources.description: LLM-optimized summary covering silicon photonic chip tapeout specs, hardware validation results, and licensing.
